description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named 'MiNiFi-CPP Verify Python Compatibility' that can be triggered manually. The workflow consists of two jobs: 'centos-build' and 'docker-tests'. The 'centos-build' job runs on ubuntu-22.04, checks out the repository, sets up ccache, installs dependencies, builds centos, and uploads the resulting artifact. The 'docker-tests' job runs on ubuntu-20.04, depends on 'centos-build', and performs Docker tests on multiple platforms including Rocky Linux 8 and 9, Patchelf-ed Ubuntu 22.04 and Debian 11, and Ubuntu 22.04 with Anaconda.
